{{Quote|According to reports the Task Force has received, Mardec now spends much of his time frequenting local bars and taverns, drowning his sorrows with lum and renan irongut.|[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Detta Rotan]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Renan Irongut''' was a harsh [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] drink from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rena (planet)|Rena]] that traditional bar-room rumor claimed doubled as a potent rust remover, though none had been known to actually test that claim. It typically cost between three and five [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per shot.<ref name="GG9" /> After the death of his family who were caught in the crossfire between [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] forces, [[Riic Mardec]] spent much of his time drinking Renan Irongut and [[Lum/Legends|lum]].<ref name="AIR" />
